Related Entities

  • hospital SAINT FRANCIS HOSPITAL MUSKOGEE 4-star overall rating
  • hospital MUSKOGEE VA MEDICAL CENTER 5-star overall rating
  • snf YORK MANOR NURSING HOME 1-star, 60 beds
  • snf Broadway Care & Rehab Center 1-star, 105 beds
  • snf THE SPRINGS SKILLED NURSING AND THERAPY 2-star, 105 beds
  • snf BRENTWOOD EXTENDED CARE & REHAB 1-star, 90 beds
  • snf EASTGATE VILLAGE CARE & REHAB CENTER 2-star, 110 beds
  • snf FORT GIBSON CARE & REHAB CENTER 3-star, 66 beds
  • snf COUNTRYSIDE ESTATES 3-star, 111 beds
  • snf MUSKOGEE NURSING CENTER 2-star, 58 beds
  • snf HASKELL CARE CENTER 2-star, 58 beds
  • snf PLEASANT VALLEY HEALTH CARE CENTER 1-star, 101 beds
Methodology

Data source: Medicare Geographic Variation by County (dataset ID: geo-var-county). Vintage: 2023. Downloaded: 2026-04-12. Rows in source: 33,639.

Additional data sources: CDC PLACES County-Level Data (2026)

Medicare Geographic Variation shows standardized per capita spending, utilization, and demographic characteristics for Medicare fee-for-service beneficiaries at the county level. Standardized payments remove geographic payment adjustments to enable fair comparison across regions.

Full methodology →
